allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['Id'], i['DomainName'], [a['Items'][0] for a in [i['Aliases']] if a['Quantity']>0]\) for i in d['DistributionList']['Items']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(z['Id'], z['Name']\) for z in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['HostedZones']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Certificate']; print\('Domain:', d['DomainName']\); print\('SANs:', d.get\('SubjectAlternativeNames', []\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Distribution']; print\('ID:', d['Id']\); print\('Domain:', d['DomainName']\); print\('Status:', d['Status']\)")
